ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the algorithm */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Machine learning framework the algorithm is compatible with */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the algorithm (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "default_hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON field to store default hyperparameters for the algorithm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the hyperparameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the hyperparameter */,
  "value_range" TEXT /* JSON field to store the range of valid values for the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hyperparameters_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "metrics_calculated" TEXT /* JSON field to store which metrics were calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., URL, file path) */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, Parquet) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, squared error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_hyperparameters" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hyperparameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter used in the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the hyperparameter was set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "hyperparameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
